---
title: "Hobbies & Interests"
---

I am passionate about running, cycling, triathlon, and recently also HYROX. Endurance sport is a great balance to my academic work, and lessons from one often carry over into the other.

I also really enjoy mountain and water sports. I am a certified trainer in multiple sports, because I love sharing my passion for sport with others.

Outside of work and sports, I enjoy making pizza in my pizza oven, preparing good espresso, and spending time with friends.

## Gallery

<div class="hobby-gallery">
  <figure>
    <img src="assets/hobbies/cycling-track.webp" alt="Cycling on a training track">
  </figure>
  <figure>
    <img src="assets/hobbies/triathlon-run.webp" alt="Running during a triathlon">
  </figure>
  <figure>
    <img src="assets/hobbies/kitesurfing.webp" alt="Kitesurfing in golden evening light">
  </figure>
  <figure>
    <img src="assets/hobbies/mountain-climbing.webp" alt="Climbing in the mountains with a helmet and via ferrata set">
  </figure>
  <figure>
    <img src="assets/hobbies/ski-touring.webp" alt="Ski touring in snowy mountains">
  </figure>
</div>
